final:
module RefModule(
    input [3:0] A,
    input B,
    input RST,
    input clk,        // Added clk input
    output reg [4:0] Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (RST) begin
        Q <= 0;
    end else begin
        Q <= A + B;
    end
end

endmodule
